headline: Tech Hedge Fund: One of the 'Magnificent 7' May Not Make 2030 Top 40
summary: The tech leaderboard of 2030 could look radically different, not just because of who rises but also because of who fades.

headline: Steve Jobs Once Cited Leonardo Da Vinci's Example To Explain Why All 'Major' Thinkers Had This Trait That Made Them Exceptional
summary: Steve Jobs believed the most successful innovators are those who can both think and do, citing Leonardo da Vinci as an example. This hands-on approach is reflected in companies like Apple and Tesla.

headline: Bill Gates Sr. Helped Howard Schultz Buy Starbucks In 1987 By Towering Over A Rival Investor: 'This Kid Is Going To Realize His Dream'
summary: Bill Gates Sr. helped Howard Schultz buy Starbucks in 1987, leading to its massive success. Gates Sr.'s mentorship was crucial for the company's growth.

headline: Reddit Eyes Sam Altman's Iris-Scanning Orb To Verify Real Users Without Compromising Anonymity: Report
summary: Reddit is reportedly considering integrating Sam Altman's iris-scanning World ID technology to verify users anonymously.

headline: This Mondelez International Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 3 Upgrades For Friday
Google Offers To Boost Rivals In Search Results To Avoid EU Antitrust Fine Under Digital Markets Act: Report
summary: Google has proposed changes to its search results to spotlight rivals more prominently in an effort to avoid a major EU antitrust fine.

headline: Apple Eyes Perplexity AI Acquisition While Facing Shareholder Lawsuit Over Exaggerated AI Progress: Report
summary: Apple is reportedly exploring an acquisition of Perplexity while facing a lawsuit accusing the company of overstating its AI progress.

headline: Sam Altman Says AI Will Make His Kids More Capable, Not More Intelligent: 'My Kids Will Never Be Smarter Than AI'
summary: AI's impact on future generations discussed by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. He believes his children will excel with AI.

headline: Meta Tried Luring OpenAI's Top Minds With Massive Paychecks, But Sam Altman 'Neglected To Mention That He's Countering Those Offers,' Says Andrew Bosworth
summary: Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth revealed that OpenAI is actively countering Meta's massive job offers, despite Sam Altman's claims.

headline: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Adds Airbnb, AMD, Shopify To Portfolio, Slashes Stake In Circle Internet
After Failed SSI Takeover, Meta Now Eyes CEO Daniel Gross And Ex-GitHub Chief Nat Friedman
summary: Meta Inc. failed to acquire SSI, a $32B AI startup. Now, they are focused on recruiting top talent after bringing in Scale AI's CEO.

headline: Tesla Faces Safety Questions From Regulators Ahead Of Robotaxi Launch In Austin
summary: Regulators scrutinize Tesla's safety protocols for upcoming Robotaxi launch in Austin. Critics raise concerns over performance.

headline: Tokyo Cancels Key Security Summit After Trump Administration Pushes For 3.5% Defense Spending: Report
summary: Japan canceled a key security summit with the U.S. after the Trump administration abruptly demanded a steeper defense spending hike.
